chunks.text: September IRIS Server Patching | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar September IRIS Server Patching Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, September 9th, 2025. Various IRIS Windows and

ay, September 9th, 2025. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers will be patched and rebooted Tuesday, Wednesday, or Thursday. PRINT, WINTERM and WDS will automatically patch and reboot Wednesday, September 10th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable

ember 10th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday, depending on additional software updates. Linux servers lists.eecs, iris2.eecs (for access to the network and roster databases) will be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. D

s) will be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS servers cronus, themis, and rhea may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Thursday, September 11th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime

departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from about 9am to 9:30am (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). Linux login servers login.eecs/login-mfa.eecs will also be patched and rebooted around this time. UPDATE [2025-09-

ed and rebooted around this time. UPDATE [2025-09-11 | larsrohr ] Resolved as of 2025-09-11 11am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are list
